title: Change Drill Down In Pie Chart
excerpt: I would like to be able to configure which view I show when someone drills down on a section of a pie chart. By default when a section of the chart is clicked the system opens the main table. I have many items on the tab…

posts.author: ND-Dan (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to configure which view I show when someone drills down on a section of a pie chart. By default when a section of the chart is clicked the system opens the main table. I have many items on the table I do not want people outside of the team to see. The only way to do that is to manually set view permissions for each column. In this case I have 40 columns to manually set permissions on. If I could point the drill down to a view with hidden columns, I could accomplish this task in moments.
